query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `investment_allocations` (
  `id` INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `agreementId` INT NOT NULL,
  `investorId` INT NOT NULL,
  `allocationSource` ENUM('network_pool_40') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'network_pool_40',
  `percentageOfPool` DECIMAL(5,2) NOT NULL,
  `percentageOfTotal` DECIMAL(5,2) NOT NULL,
  `allocatedAmount` DECIMAL(15,2) NOT NULL,
  `distributionType` ENUM('profit_share', 'revenue_share', 'dividend', 'interest') NOT NULL,
  `distributionFrequency` ENUM('monthly', 'quarterly', 'annually', 'on_exit') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'quarterly',
  `lastDistributionDate` TIMESTAMP,
  `totalDistributed` DECIMAL(15,2) DEFAULT 0.00,
  `status` ENUM('active', 'suspended', 'terminated') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active',
  `createdAt` TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user nC6sHo9eqXDn4Lp.root --database SPWUc63a3tjYuzCxiuEomB --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `investment_allocations` (
  `id` INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `agreementId` INT NOT NULL,
  `investorId` INT NOT NULL,
  `allocationSource` ENUM('network_pool_40') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'network_pool_40',
  `percentageOfPool` DECIMAL(5,2) NOT NULL,
  `percentageOfTotal` DECIMAL(5,2) NOT NULL,
  `allocatedAmount` DECIMAL(15,2) NOT NULL,
  `distributionType` ENUM('profit_share', 'revenue_share', 'dividend', 'interest') NOT NULL,
  `distributionFrequency` ENUM('monthly', 'quarterly', 'annually', 'on_exit') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'quarterly',
  `lastDistributionDate` TIMESTAMP,
  `totalDistributed` DECIMAL(15,2) DEFAULT 0.00,
  `status` ENUM('active', 'suspended', 'terminated') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active',
  `createdAt` TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);
